tier4.positive: At late at night in Trafalgar Square, a wind sends dust skittering across wet flagstones. Mixed warm and cool streetlamps reflect on the pavement, and the open square stretches back with clear depth and a crisp background in humid summer air.
tier4.negative: blurry, deformed, text, warped stones, smeared lights, duplicated buildings, muddy reflections
